title: Adopt metame.envelope.v1 as canonical runtime transport payload
body: All runtime payload-bearing messages across XMTP, QubeTalk, and runtime shell integrations must use metame.envelope.v1 with text fallback only for backward compatibility.
acceptance: Fallback path retained for legacy text-only messages

title: Fork convos-ios and create MetaMeRuntimeApp target
body: Create a maintained fork of xmtplabs/convos-ios and add a new app target MetaMeRuntimeApp that keeps ConvosCore/XMTP infrastructure while replacing root UX with metaMe runtime shell.
acceptance: MetaMeRuntimeApp target compiles on iPhone and iPad simulators
Convos upstream target remains buildable in same workspace
Environment config injected for AA API and QubeTalk endpoints

title: Implement MetaMeMessagingBridge in iOS app
body: Create an iOS bridge module that maps XMTP conversation events to metame runtime envelopes and routes runtime shell actions/prompt submission back over XMTP/QubeTalk.
acceptance: Inbound envelope updates runtime chat/inference state

title: Add iOS runtime hydration profile in AA API
body: Ensure runtime shell-config supports explicit iOS profiles for mobile/tablet to drive shell density/menu behavior and trust/reliability selectors in native app surfaces.
acceptance: AA API returns iOS profile hints in shell-config
Profiles distinguish mobile and tablet runtime density/layout rules
No regression for web thin client consumers
